mapper.select: SELECT M.*, D.NAME, D.NICKNAME, D.GENDER, D.EMAIL, D.WEDDING_DATE FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL D ON M.USER_ID = D.USER_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER (USER_ID, PASSWORD, ROLE, STATUS, TEL, REG_DATE) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', #{userTel}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO USER_DETAIL ( USER_ID, NAME, NICKNAME, GENDER, EMAIL, WEDDING_DATE, ANNIVERSARY_DATE, MARITAL_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{userId}, -- 임시로 아이디를 닉네임으로 사용 #{gender}, #{email}, #{weddingDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{anniversaryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{maritalStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT M.USER_ID as userId, M.TEL as tel, D.NAME as name, D.EMAIL as email, /* 닉네임이 null이면 userId를 nickName으로 가져옴 */ IFNULL(D.NICKNAME, M.USER_ID) as nickName, D.GENDER as gender, D.WEDDING_DATE as weddingDate, D.ANNIVERSARY_DATE as anniversaryDate, D.MARITAL_STATUS as maritalStatus FROM MEMBER M LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DETAIL D ON M.USER_ID = D.USER_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_DETAIL SET NAME = #{userName}, EMAIL = #{email}, GENDER = #{gender}, NICKNAME = #{nickName}, WEDDING_DATE = #{weddingDate}, MARITAL_STATUS = #{maritalStatus}, ANNIVERSARY_DATE = #{anniversaryDate} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 'WITHDRAWN', OUT_DATE = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE user_id = #{kakaoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (user_id, password, role, status, reg_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', NOW())
INSERT INTO user_detail (user_id, name, nickname, email) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT UC.coupon_code as couponCode, C.coupon_name as couponName, C.discount_rate as discountRate, UC.status, DATE_FORMAT(UC.issued_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as issuedAt, DATE_FORMAT(UC.expired_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as expiredAt FROM User_Coupon UC JOIN Coupon C ON UC.coupon_code = C.coupon_code WHERE UC.user_id = #{userId} AND C.coupon_type = 'COUPON' ORDER BY UC.issued_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM User_Coupon UC JOIN Coupon C ON UC.coupon_code = C.coupon_code WHERE UC.user_id = #{userId} AND C.coupon_type = 'COUPON'
SELECT coupon_code, coupon_name, discount_rate, max_issue_cnt FROM Coupon WHERE coupon_code = #{couponCode} AND issue_type = 'CODE' /* 코드를 입력해서 발급받는 방식인지 체크 */
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO User_Coupon ( user_id, coupon_code, status, issued_at, expired_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{couponCode}, 'UNUSED', /* 처음 등록 시 '미사용' 상태로 저장 */ CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, /* 발급 일시 */ DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) /* 기본 만료일은 발급일로부터 30일로 설정 */ )
mapper.select: SELECT UC.coupon_code AS couponCode, C.coupon_name AS couponName, C.giftcon_image AS giftconImage, UC.giftcon_code AS giftconCode, UC.giftcon_barcode AS giftconBarcode, UC.status, DATE_FORMAT(UC.expired_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expiredAt FROM User_Coupon UC JOIN Coupon C ON UC.coupon_code = C.coupon_code WHERE UC.user_id = #{userId} AND C.coupon_type = 'GIFTCON' ORDER BY UC.issued_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon (user_id, coupon_code, status, giftcon_code, giftcon_barcode, issued_at, expired_at, source_review_no) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponCode}, 'UNUSED', #{giftconCode}, #{giftconBarcode}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY), #{sourceReviewNo})
mapper.select: SELECT UPW.pass_no, UPW.remaining_count, UPW.total_purchased, PP.pass_name FROM user_pass_wallet UPW JOIN pass_product PP ON UPW.pass_no = PP.pass_no WHERE UPW.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT PP.pass_no, PP.item_name, P.pay_date, P.pay_status, UPW.remaining_count FROM payment P JOIN payment_pass PP ON P.pay_no = PP.pay_no JOIN user_pass_wallet UPW ON P.user_id = UPW.user_id AND PP.pass_no = UPW.pass_no WHERE P.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment P JOIN payment_pass PP ON P.pay_no = PP.pay_no WHERE P.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_pass_wallet SET remaining_count = remaining_count - 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND remaining_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT R.res_no, R.res_date, R.res_time, R.res_status, P.product_name, C.com_name, P.original_price FROM reservation R LEFT JOIN product P ON R.product_no = P.product_no LEFT JOIN company C ON P.company_no = C.company_no WHERE R.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY R.res_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT R.review_no, R.title, R.rating, R.reg_date, R.img_url, C.com_name, R.thumbnail_url FROM pass_usage_log PUL JOIN review R ON PUL.review_no = R.review_no LEFT JOIN company C ON R.company_no = C.company_no WHERE PUL.user_id = #{userId} AND R.is_paid = 1 AND R.user_id != #{userId} ORDER BY PUL.used_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT R.review_no, R.title, R.rating, R.reg_date, R.img_url, C.com_name, R.thumbnail_url FROM free_view_log FVL JOIN review R ON FVL.review_no = R.review_no LEFT JOIN company C ON R.company_no = C.company_no WHERE FVL.user_id = #{userId} AND R.is_paid = 0 AND R.user_id != #{userId} ORDER BY FVL.viewed_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT post_no, category, title, view_cnt, like_cnt, reg_date FROM community_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT review_no, title, rating, reg_date, approval_status FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT comment_no, content, reg_date, post_no, review_no FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT CL.like_no, CL.company_no, C.com_name, C.com_type FROM company_like CL JOIN company C ON CL.company_no = C.company_no WHERE CL.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CL.like_no, CL.post_no, CP.title, CP.category, CP.reg_date, CP.view_cnt FROM community_like CL JOIN community_post CP ON CL.post_no = CP.post_no WHERE CL.user_id = #{userId} AND CP.user_id != #{userId} LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT RL.like_no, RL.review_no, R.title, R.rating, R.reg_date FROM review_like RL JOIN review R ON RL.review_no = R.review_no WHERE RL.user_id = #{userId} AND R.user_id != #{userId} LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT inquiry_no, inquiry_type, title, status, reg_date FROM inquiry WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT report_no, target_type, report_title, answer_status, reg_date FROM report WHERE reporter_id = #{reporterId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startIndex}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(anniversary_date, '%Y-%m-%d') FROM user_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND anniversary_date IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMPANY WHERE COM_NAME = #{comName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER (USER_ID, PASSWORD, ROLE, STATUS, TEL, REG_DATE) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, 'NPARTNER', 'ACTIVE', #{comTel}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO COMPANY (COM_NAME, COM_TYPE, USER_ID, COM_ADDRESS, BIZ_NO, CEO_NAME, COM_TEL, COM_EMAIL, REGISTRATION_FEE) VALUES ( #{comName}, #{comType}, #{userId}, #{comAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizNo}, #{ceoName}, #{comTel}, #{comEmail}, 'FREE' )
mapper.select: SELECT R.review_no, R.title, R.img_url, R.reg_date, R.is_paid, R.user_id, IFNULL(R.thumbnail_url, R.img_url) AS thumbnailUrl, CASE WHEN PUL.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_purchased, UD.nickname AS userNick, COUNT(RL.review_no) AS likeCnt, IFNULL(R.view_cnt, 0) AS viewCnt FROM review R LEFT JOIN pass_usage_log PUL ON R.review_no = PUL.review_no AND PUL.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN user_detail UD ON R.user_id = UD.user_id LEFT JOIN review_like RL ON R.review_no = RL.review_no WHERE R.approval_status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY R.review_no, R.title, R.img_url, R.reg_date, R.is_paid, R.user_id, R.thumbnail_url, PUL.user_id, UD.nickname, R.view_cnt ORDER BY likeCnt DESC LIMIT 4
SELECT post_no, title, like_cnt, view_cnt, reg_date FROM community_post WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY like_cnt DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_chat_log ( user_id, question, answer, chat_type, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{chatType}, NOW() )
